title: youtube-tool e2e test command on Render
html:
Terminal showing npm run test:e2e against youtube-tool-e513.onrender.com with BASE_URL / APP_PASSWORD / CLIENT_ID env vars — the YouTube-tool service (Render-hosted) being smoke-tested as part of the Rankett sub-tool stack. (Test password redacted-as-test-creds, not Yahir's personal secret.)

rankett · render · youtube tool · ai visibility engine
